channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Government Supports Beekeepers with Hives and Training to Grow Honey Sector
item.description: The Tanzanian government is giving big support to the beekeeping sector to increase honey production and help local communities earn more. For the 2026/2027 financial year, they will provide 11,000 hi...

item.title: Victor Stiebel and His Timeless Contributions to Mid-20th Century Fashion
item.description: Victor Stiebel (1907–1976) was a South African-born British fashion designer renowned for his romantic and feminine style. Rising to prominence in the 1930s, he became a key member of London’s “Big Te...

item.title: Philippines Faces Stagflation Amid Slow Growth and Rising Inflation
item.description: The Philippine economy is showing signs of stagflation, a combination of weak growth and rising inflation, although government officials have offered mixed statements on the situation. Socioeconomic P...

item.title: Jeremy Clarkson discusses his health recovery and challenges of farming
item.description: Jeremy Clarkson, the 66-year-old television presenter and former Top Gear host, has provided an update on his health following a serious scare in 2024 when he suffered severe chest pains at his Cotswo...

item.title: TUI withdraws sponsorship from Married at First Sight amid allegations of sexual misconduct
item.description: TUI has officially ended its sponsorship of the Channel 4 reality programme Married at First Sight following serious allegations of sexual assault and rape involving contestants. The decision came aft...

item.title: Nenshi criticizes Smith's approach amid Alberta separation referendum discussions

item.title: ANC invites public input for selection of mayoral candidates ahead of local elections

item.title: Challenges Facing Labor in Communicating Budget Policies

item.title: NTA clarifies NEET UG 2026 re-exam due to irregularities, not paper leak

item.title: Financial Experts Advise Against Using Academic Certificates as Loan Security
item.description: Financial experts in Tanzania are raising concern about the growing trend of using academic certificates as collateral for loans. This practice, increasingly common among informal lenders and some fin...

item.title: U.S. Criticizes Canada’s Defence Spending and Military Preparedness

item.title: Paul Newman Enjoys Ice Cream with a Cat at Griffith Park Zoo in 1956
item.description: In 1956, legendary actor Paul Newman was photographed at the Griffith Park Zoo in Los Angeles enjoying an ice cream while casually carrying a Siamese cat named Louis XIV on his shoulder. The scene is ...

item.title: Sadio Mané: Senegal’s Veteran Leader Heads into 2026 World Cup
item.description: Sadio Mané, now 34, continues to be the standout figure of Senegalese football as the country heads into the 2026 World Cup in North America. Having been inspired by Senegal's remarkable 2002 World Cu...

item.title: Rishabh Pant Faces Setbacks in International Cricket and IPL
